lines: Can you feel the breeze changing direction, {player}?
Rain makes the world fresh and new. I love the smell!
The sky has so many different moods, doesn't it, {player}?
no_quest_line: You're a master of the sky's moods, {player}!
quest_offer_line: The clouds are looking a bit confused. Will you help me predict the weather, {player}?
quest_progress_line: Windy today, sunny tomorrow... you're a great weather watcher, {player}!
quest_complete_line: Clear skies ahead! Thank you for helping me understand the weather, {player}.
